message:
feat(ui): add bookmarks, saved searches, and ruleset profile endpoints

Extend both web API and TUI with new UI surface capabilities:

Web API (crates/wa-core/src/web.rs):
- EventAnnotationsView with secret-redacted annotation rendering
- /bookmarks endpoint: list pane bookmarks with redacted descriptions
- /ruleset-profiles endpoint: list active ruleset profile summaries
- /saved-searches endpoint: list and manage saved search configurations
- All new views use Redactor for secret sanitization before serialization

UI query helpers (crates/wa-core/src/ui_query.rs — new file):
- PaneBookmarkView, SavedSearchView, RulesetProfileView for shared
  read-only data access across TUI and web frontends
- Conversion impls from storage records to view types

TUI (crates/wa-core/src/tui/):
- app.rs: integrate bookmarks, saved searches, and cleanup commands
  into the TUI application state and input handling
- query.rs: add bookmark and saved search query functions
- views.rs: add rendering for bookmark list and saved search panels

CLI (crates/wa/src/main.rs):
- Add cleanup subcommand (preview/apply) wired to cleanup engine
- Add bookmarks subcommand for listing/managing pane bookmarks
- Add sync subcommand for file synchronization operations
- Wire new modules into CLI dispatch

Library (crates/wa-core/src/lib.rs):
- Export new cleanup, ui_query, and sync modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
